    Interface IVertexCustom

    Represents the interface that must be implemented by a custom vertex fragment.

    Inherited Members
    IVertexMaterial.GetColor(int)
    IVertexMaterial.GetTexCoord(int)
    IVertexMaterial.SetColor(int, Vector4)
    IVertexMaterial.SetTexCoord(int, Vector2)

    IVertexMaterial.MaxTextCoords
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IVertexCustom : IVertexMaterial

    Properties

    Name Description
    CustomAttributes

    Gets a collection of the attribute keys defined in this vertex.

    Methods

    Name Description
    SetCustomAttribute(string, object)

    Sets a custom attribute only if attributeName is defined in the vertex.

    ⚠️ USE ONLY ON UNBOXED VALUES ⚠️
    TryGetCustomAttribute(string, out object)

    Tries to get a custom attribute.
    Validate()

    Validates the custom attributes of the vertex fragment.
